problem_title: Compliance slows when provider outputs disconnect
problem_description: Digital asset compliance teams face delays and duplicated work when KYC, KYT and other provider results remain siloed across separate tools. Manual handoffs between onboarding and transaction monitoring weaken auditability and obscure risk context during critical reviews.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links onboarding checks with wallet risk and transaction monitoring results to create one continuous, auditable compliance workflow that reduces manual handoffs and preserves risk context for operations teams.
workflow_title: From KYC checks to KYT review
workflow_description: SFTY links KYC provider results to KYT risk signals, routing alerts into cases for structured review, decision logs and audit-ready evidence preservation.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY connect KYC outputs to KYT monitoring workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how KYC results flow into KYT case reviews
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how SFTY preserves audit evidence for KYC to KYT handoffs
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how provider orchestration supports seamless compliance workflows
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY connect KYC to KYT workflows?
faq_1_answer: SFTY links KYC and KYT outputs into a connected workflow, enabling seamless transfer of identity checks and wallet risk signals without manual intervention.
faq_2_question: How are manual handoffs between providers reduced?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures provider outputs into connected cases and decision workflows, minimizing manual data transfers between onboarding, transaction monitoring and alert teams.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready compliance evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves complete case histories, decision logs and supporting evidence to support audit readiness and regulatory review.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY integrates with your current KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers by connecting their outputs into one compliance control layer.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC and KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing providers and structures their outputs; it does not replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule solution vendors.
final_title: Connect KYC results to KYT monitoring workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY links identity verification outputs with wallet risk signals into audit-ready, structured compliance workflows for VASPs.
